Statement: DEL-013-05 implements SOW-0039 (Install welding station ventilation/exhaust system)
Notes: FACT. Confirmed in decomposition scope ledger: SOW-0039 maps to DEL-013-05 under PKG-013.

Statement: DEL-013-05 traces to OBJ-001 (Deliver a code-compliant fully functional maintenance shop)
Notes: FACT. OBJ-001 confirmed in decomposition objectives table.

Statement: DEL-013-05 traces to OBJ-004 (Install and commission all mechanical systems to operational readiness)
Notes: FACT. OBJ-004 confirmed in decomposition objectives table.

Statement: Exhaust airflow volume shall be coordinated with DEL-013-03 to ensure adequate makeup air is provided to replace extracted air volume
EvidenceQuote: exhaust airflow volume shall be coordinated with DEL-013-03
Notes: FACT. Bidirectional interface: exhaust CFM from DEL-013-05 must be coordinated with makeup air capacity of DEL-013-03. Both systems require each others design parameters.

Statement: Both DEL-013-05 and DEL-013-04 extract air from the same building volume; aggregate exhaust volume and duct routing and stack proximity must be coordinated at mechanical design stage
EvidenceQuote: Both systems extract air from the same building volume
Notes: FACT. Explicit coordination requirement for aggregate exhaust volume and duct routing. Also referenced in Procedure Step 1.3.

Statement: IFC structural/envelope drawings from PKG-011 required for ductwork penetration locations and exhaust stack penetration details before installation can proceed
Notes: FACT. Procedure prerequisites explicitly list IFC structural/envelope drawings from PKG-011. Procedure Step 3.1 confirms coordination with PKG-011 for penetrations.

Statement: Exhaust fan motor power circuit and controls wiring require coordination with PKG-015 Electrical
EvidenceQuote: coordinate with PKG-015 Electrical for motor power circuit
Notes: FACT. Procedure Steps 3.6 and 3.8 explicitly require electrical coordination for fan motor and controls wiring.

Statement: County to supply welding equipment specifications (welding processes and base metals) per R-01 S3.4; required to determine fume character and size hood and filtration system
EvidenceQuote: Obtain welding equipment specifications from the County (per R-01 S3.4)
Notes: FACT. RFP S3.4 states County to supply welding equipment specifications. Procedure Step 1.1 identifies this as the first design step. Datasheet confirms TBD status. This is the primary design gate.

Statement: Exhaust outlet and stack location requires approval from AHJ and applicable environmental authority including potential EPEA review before finalizing penetration locations
EvidenceQuote: Confirm exhaust outlet and stack location with AHJ and any applicable environmental authority
Notes: FACT. Procedure Step 1.6 explicitly requires AHJ and environmental authority approval before penetration locations are finalized with PKG-011. Specification REQ-006 corroborates.

Statement: Exhaust CFM design data from DEL-013-05 is required input to DEL-013-03 makeup air system sizing to maintain building pressure balance
EvidenceQuote: Exhaust volume affects makeup air requirements
Notes: FACT. REQ-009 and Guidance Principle 6 establish that exhaust volume from this system is a required input to makeup air sizing. Distinct from DEP-013-05-004 which captures upstream interface.

Statement: Potential heat recovery interface between welding exhaust and high-recovery heating system; exhaust of conditioned air affects heating load
EvidenceQuote: Potential heat recovery interface with DEL-013-01 (ASSUMPTION)
Notes: ASSUMPTION. Datasheet explicitly marks this as an open design question. Guidance Cold Climate Stack Considerations corroborates energy impact but no specific data/artifact transfer is confirmed yet. Retained at LOW confidence per CONSERVATIVE strictness.

Statement: Welding station location and count must be finalized before hood and ductwork can be designed and located
EvidenceQuote: Required before hood and ductwork can be designed and located
Notes: FACT. Procedure prerequisites explicitly list welding station location and layout finalization as not complete. Procedure Step 1.2 confirms this as a required design input.
